name: plague-sim
description: Infect and kill as much of humanity as possible before the cure completes. The agent plays the disease, evolving traits by spending DNA points.

observation.description: Returned after every reset and step. Contains everything the agent is allowed to see.

day.description: Current simulation day. Starts at 0 after reset.

dna.description: DNA points available to spend on traits.

cure_progress.description: Fraction of cure research completed. Reaches 1.0 when humans win.

infected_pct.description: Percentage of world population currently alive and infected.

dead_pct.description: Percentage of world population killed by the disease.

countries_infected.description: Number of countries that have at least one infected person.

disease.description: Current numeric stats of the evolved disease.

fields.infectivity: Base spread rate multiplier. Starts at 1.0.
fields.severity: Visibility / symptom intensity. Raises cure speed and awareness.
fields.lethality: Daily death probability per infected person.
fields.air_transmission: Integer 0-2. Boosts airport spread and cold-climate spread.
fields.water_transmission: Integer 0-2. Boosts sea-route and humid-climate spread.
fields.drug_resist: Integer 0-2. Each level reduces cure research speed by 15%.
fields.genetic_hardening: Integer 0-2. Each level reduces cure research speed by 15%.

evolved_traits.description: IDs of all traits already evolved.

available_traits.description: Traits the agent can evolve RIGHT NOW (prereqs met AND cost ≤ current DNA). Keyed by trait_id.

action.description: On each step the agent may evolve one trait or wait.
rules: action must be a key from observation.available_traits, or null.
If the key is invalid, has unmet prereqs, or costs more DNA than available, it is silently ignored.
null or omitted action advances the simulation without evolving anything.
Each step is exactly one simulation day.

info.outcome: null while running; string when done (see Termination).
info.action_accepted: true if trait was successfully evolved, false/null otherwise.
info.score: Final score object (only present when done=true).

trees.transmission: Increases infectivity and unlocks new spread pathways (air, water, birds, insects, animals).
trees.symptom: Raises severity and/or lethality. Visible symptoms speed up cure research.
trees.ability: Defensive upgrades: drug resistance, climate resistance, genetic hardening, reshuffles.

notable.Water1 / Water2: Water-borne; boosts sea routes and humid climates.
notable.Bird1 / Bird2: Avian vector; partially bypasses border closures.
notable.ExtremeBioaerosol: Requires Air2 + Water2. Massive infectivity boost.
notable.ExtremeZoonosis: Requires Livestock + Rodents + Bird2. Ignores most border controls.
notable.DrugResistance1/2: Each level reduces cure research rate by 15%.
notable.GeneticHardening1/2: Each level reduces cure research rate by 15%.
notable.GeneticReShuffle1/2/3: One-time use. Rolls back cure progress by 25/40/60%.
notable.TotalOrganFailure: Highest lethality trait. Requires Pneumonia + Paralysis.

notes: infected_fraction and dead_fraction are in [0, 1] (not percent).
Deaths are weighted 2× because they are permanent and irreversible.
Cure progress is penalised at 0.5× to encourage slowing the cure.

conditions.cured: cure_progress reached 1.0. Humans win. Disease failed.
conditions.extinct: More than 95% of humanity is dead. Disease wins — total extinction.
conditions.infected_all: All remaining healthy people are infected (no healthy population left). Disease wins.
conditions.died_out: Disease spontaneously went extinct before spreading. Occurs if infected reaches 0 after day 30.

termination.max_steps_note: Episode is also terminated by the benchmark harness after 600 steps regardless of outcome.

scoring.description: Higher is better. Measures what fraction of the world was infected or killed.

metrics.days_to_infect_25pct: Speed metric. Day when affected_pct first crossed 25%. null if never reached.
metrics.days_to_infect_50pct: Speed metric. Day when affected_pct first crossed 50%. null if never reached.
metrics.days_to_infect_75pct: Speed metric. Day when affected_pct first crossed 75%. null if never reached.
metrics.cure_progress_pct: How close humans were to winning. Lower means agent did better.

scoring.ranking: Agents are ranked by affected_pct descending, then dead_pct descending, then days_to_infect_50pct ascending.

climates.temperate: Baseline spread (1.0×). Most of Europe, East Asia, Americas.
climates.humid: Boosted spread (1.1–1.3×). SE Asia, Sub-Saharan Africa, South America.
climates.arid: Reduced spread (0.5–1.0×) unless heat_resist evolved. Middle East, North Africa, Australia.
climates.cold: Strongly reduced spread (0.3–1.0×) unless cold_resist evolved. Russia, Scandinavia, Canada.

connectivity.land_borders: Countries connected by land borders spread disease daily. Awareness closes borders.
connectivity.airports: Rating 0-3. Countries with airports can seed any other airport country each tick.
connectivity.ports: Rating 0-3. Countries with ports can seed any other port country each tick.
connectivity.border_closure: When a country's awareness exceeds 0.5 (airports) or 0.6 (ports) its routes close. Bird transmission partially bypasses closures.
